title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Department of Social Welfare and Development Regarding the Distribution of Assistance to Individuals in Crisis Situation (AICS) Under Republic No. 11494 or the ?bayanihan to Recover As One Act?.
